system.description: Hold a physical copy of any mass-produced piece of media, whisper a message into it, and roll [quality].

outcomes.success: you encode the message into the media. From now on, a growing community of people who experience this media will also experience your message. If it is a call to action or set of instructions, a sizable number of people will follow it. Any viewer, reader, or listener is considered to be under the effect of Bug for 24 hours following their experience. This does not count toward the normal limit of Bugs.
outcomes.triscendence: this shared experience is powerful enough to immediately create an Anomaly, whose Domain is based on the original media and whose Focus is based on your message. It considers you its leader and creator.
outcomes.failure: you accidentally insert a clumsy message that can easily be traced back to you. Add a number of Loose Ends commensurate with how popular the chosen media is.
